item.title: Identity file generators (SOUL.md, AGENTS.md, etc.)
item.intent: Generate SOUL.md and AGENTS.md from the blueprint so every forged agent has a distinct identity. Identity files must be read-only at runtime — agents cannot rewrite who they are.
item.description: IDENTITY IS THE PRODUCT: SOUL.md defines who the agent IS — its personality, communication style, boundaries. Without it, the user gets a generic OpenClaw instance, not a purpose-built agent. Read-only mount means the agent cannot modify its own personality at runtime (LM-12 prevention). SOUL.md (not IDENTITY.md) per current docs. Acceptance: SOUL.md generated from blueprint + wizard answers; AGENTS.md reflects correct tool/skill inventory; identity files mounted read-only in container; token budget respected.
steps: Generate SOUL.md from blueprint definition + wizard answers
Generate AGENTS.md reflecting correct tool/skill inventory
Mount identity files read-only in container
Enforce token budget for identity content
acceptanceCriteria: SOUL.md generated with personality, communication style, boundaries from blueprint
Identity files mounted read-only in container (LM-12 prevention)
Token budget respected — identity content fits within limits
